title: Dombeya tsaratananensis
taxonomy: Dombeya tsaratananensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the hibiscus or mallow family. It belongs to the genus Dombeya, which comprises about 60 species of flowering plants. The genus Dombeya is further classified under the tribe Dombyeae, which is part of the subfamily Dombyoideae. This classification places Dombeya tsaratananensis in the larger Malvaceae family, which includes a wide range of flowering plants. The classification of Dombeya tsaratananensis is based on its physical characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants in the same family.
